creator: damjan.jov@gmail.com
text:
Here is a better version of that table:

  EIM | DENY_INCOMING | NAT type, by RFC                               | Comment
------+---------------+------------------------------------------------+-----------
unset |        unset  | RFC 4787: address and port-dependent mapping   | These are
      |               |           address and port-dependent filtering | the only
      |               | RFC 3489: "symmetric" NAT                      | ways that
------+---------------+------------------------------------------------| libalias
unset |          set  | RFC 4787: address and port-dependent mapping   | works
      |               |           address and port-dependent filtering | at
      |               | RFC 3489: "symmetric" NAT                      | present.
------+---------------+------------------------------------------------+-----------
  set |        unset  | RFC 4787: endpoint-independent mapping         | My patch
      |               |           endpoint-independent filtering       | adds
      |               | RFC 3489: "full cone" NAT                      | these
------+---------------+------------------------------------------------| bottom
  set |          set  | RFC 4787: endpoint-independent mapping         | 2 rows
      |               |           address and port-dependent filtering | as
      |               | RFC 3489: "port restricted cone" NAT           | options.
